ns0:entry.ns0:title: Anxcye/anx-reader
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Anxcye/anx-reader
Language: dart
Featuring powerful AI capabilities and supporting various e-book formats, it makes reading smarter and more focused.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/AppFlowy-IO/AppFlowy
Language: dart
Bring projects, wikis, and teams together with AI. AppFlowy is the AI collaborative workspace where you achieve more without losing control of your data. The leading open source Notion alternative.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: BasedHardware/omi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/BasedHardware/omi
Language: dart
AI that sees your screen, listens to your conversations and tells you what to do

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Cateners/tiny_computer
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Cateners/tiny_computer
Language: dart
Click-to-run debian 13 with desktop environment on android for Chinese users, with fcitx pinyin input method and some useful packages preinstalled. You don't need to install Termux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Chevey339/kelivo
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Chevey339/kelivo
Language: dart
A Flutter LLM Chat Client. Support Mobile & Desktop.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: KRTirtho/spotube
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/KRTirtho/spotube
Language: dart
🎧 Open source music streaming app! Available for both desktop & mobile!

ns0:entry.ns0:title: Predidit/Kazumi
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/Predidit/Kazumi
Language: dart
基于自定义规则的番剧采集APP，支持流媒体在线观看，支持弹幕，支持实时超分辨率。

ns0:entry.ns0:title: TheLastGimbus/GooglePhotosTakeoutHelper
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/TheLastGimbus/GooglePhotosTakeoutHelper
Language: dart
Script that organizes the Google Takeout archive into one big chronological folder

ns0:entry.ns0:title: ViscousPot/GitSync
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/ViscousPot/GitSync
Language: dart
Mobile Git client for syncing a repository between remote and a local directory

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/academind/flutter-complete-guide-course-resources

URL: https://github.com/cogwheel0/conduit

The Dart SDK, including the VM, JS and Wasm compilers, analysis, core libraries, and more.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: getlantern/lantern
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/getlantern/lantern
Language: dart
Open-source VPN for speed, privacy, and censorship circumvention. Free to download on Android, iOS, Windows, macOS, and Linux.

ns0:entry.ns0:title: hiddify/hiddify-app
ns0:entry.ns0:content:
URL: https://github.com/hiddify/hiddify-app
Language: dart
Multi-platform auto-proxy client, supporting Sing-box, X-ray, TUIC, Hysteria, Reality, Trojan, SSH etc. It’s an open-source, secure and ad-free.

ns0:entry.ns0:content:
